languages.text: "Лукха, наш хирургеон, на северо-западе отсюда, у дороги к руинам. Оттуда пришли первые раненные, а за ними по пятам твари. Ну Лукха и начал оказывать первую помощь прямо на месте..."

"Lukha, our chirurgeon, is north-west of here, along the road to the ruins. That's where the first wounded came, with the creatures hot on their trail. So, he started administering first aid right on the spot..."
languages.original_text: "Лукха, наш хирургеон, на северо-западе отсюда, у дороги к руинам. Оттуда пришли первые раненные, а за ними по пятам твари. Ну Лукха и начал оказывать первую помощь прямо на месте..."

traits.locale_text: "Lukha, our chirurgeon, is north-west of here, along the road to the ruins. That's where the first wounded came with the creatures hot on their trail. So he started administering first aid right on the spot..."

"Lukha, our chirurgeon, is north-west of here, along the road to the ruins. That's where the first wounded came, with the creatures hot on their trail. So, he started administering first aid right on the spot..."

"Lukha, our chirurgeon, is north-west of here, along the road to the ruins — that's where the first wounded came in seconds before the attack. So he started administering first aid right on the spot..."

"Lukha, our chirurgeon, is north-west of here, along the road to the ruins. That's where the first wounded came, with the creatures hot on their trail. So, he started administering first aid right on the spot..."

languages.text: 「ルカ、当の外科医は、ここ北西、遺跡への道沿いにいる。攻撃直前に最初の負傷者が駆けつけた場所だ。そこで彼は即座に応急処置を始めた…」
languages.original_text: "Lukha, our chirurgeon, is north-west of here, along the road to the ruins — that's where the first wounded came in seconds before the attack. So he started administering first aid right on the spot..."

traits.locale_text: 「ルカ、当の外科医は、ここ北西、遺跡への道沿いにいる。攻撃直前に最初の負傷者が駆けつけた場所だ。そこで彼は即座に応急処置を始めた…」

languages.text: «Lukha, nuestro cirujano, está al noroeste, siguiendo el camino a las ruinas. De ahí llegaron los primeros heridos, con esas criaturas pisándoles los talones. Empezó a administrar primeros auxilios al instante...».
languages.original_text: "Lukha, our chirurgeon, is north-west of here, along the road to the ruins. That's where the first wounded came, with the creatures hot on their trail. So, he started administering first aid right on the spot..."

traits.locale_text: «Lukha, nuestro cirujano, está al noroeste, siguiendo el camino a las ruinas. De ahí llegaron los primeros heridos, con esas criaturas pisándoles los talones. Empezó a administrar primeros auxilios al instante...».

languages.text: "Lukha, unser Chirurgeum, ist nordwestlich von hier, auf der Straße zu den Ruinen. Von dort kamen die ersten Verwundeten mit den Kreaturen im Nacken. Er hat also sofort damit begonnen, Erste Hilfe zu leisten."
languages.original_text: "Lukha, our chirurgeon, is north-west of here, along the road to the ruins. That's where the first wounded came, with the creatures hot on their trail. So, he started administering first aid right on the spot..."

traits.locale_text: "Lukha, unser Chirurgeum, ist nordwestlich von hier, auf der Straße zu den Ruinen. Von dort kamen die ersten Verwundeten mit den Kreaturen im Nacken. Er hat also sofort damit begonnen, Erste Hilfe zu leisten."

languages.text: « Lukha, notre chirurgeon, se trouve au nord-ouest, sur la route qui mène aux ruines. C'est de là que sont arrivés les premiers blessés, les créatures à leurs trousses. Il a donc commencé à les soigner sur place... »
languages.original_text: "Lukha, our chirurgeon, is north-west of here, along the road to the ruins. That's where the first wounded came, with the creatures hot on their trail. So, he started administering first aid right on the spot..."

traits.locale_text: « Lukha, notre chirurgeon, se trouve au nord-ouest, sur la route qui mène aux ruines. C'est de là que sont arrivés les premiers blessés, les créatures à leurs trousses. Il a donc commencé à les soigner sur place... »

languages.text: “我们的船医卢卡就在此地的西北方向，通往遗迹的那条路上——第一批伤员就是从那儿撤下来的，那些怪物在他们后头穷追猛打。所以他当即在原地展开了急救……”
languages.original_text: "Lukha, our chirurgeon, is north-west of here, along the road to the ruins. That's where the first wounded came, with the creatures hot on their trail. So, he started administering first aid right on the spot..."

traits.locale_text: “我们的船医卢卡就在此地的西北方向，通往遗迹的那条路上——第一批伤员就是从那儿撤下来的，那些怪物在他们后头穷追猛打。所以他当即在原地展开了急救……”

languages.text: "Cerrahımız Lukha buranın kuzeybatısında, harabelere giden yolda... Yaratıklar enselerindeyken ilk yaralılar oradan gelmişti. Bu yüzden hemen olay yerinde ilk yardım uygulamaya başladı..."
languages.original_text: "Lukha, our chirurgeon, is north-west of here, along the road to the ruins. That's where the first wounded came, with the creatures hot on their trail. So, he started administering first aid right on the spot..."
